scope_summary: Observe the next seam behind the healthy BusinessFlow -> AFF connection. Prove whether the reproduced AFF session path now correlates to the FireFlow UserSession bridge by collecting Apache session activity around /FireFlow/api/session and retained FireFlow log clues such as UserSession::getUserSession, isUserSessionValid, Using existing FASessionId, and ff-session. Also inspect the closest BusinessFlow-side PHP caller clues under /usr/share/fa/php that could explain how AFF session context is supplied before /FireFlow/api/session. Keep this bounded and read-only.
